name: namecheap-pp-mcp
description: Manage Namecheap domains, DNS, account balances, pricing, contacts, TLDs, and SSL metadata from the terminal using Namecheap’s XML API.

namecheap_username.title: NAMECHEAP_USERNAME
namecheap_username.description: Namecheap API username (also used as UserName).

namecheap_api_key.title: NAMECHEAP_API_KEY
namecheap_api_key.description: Namecheap API key. Namecheap requires it as a query parameter.

namecheap_client_ip.title: NAMECHEAP_CLIENT_IP
namecheap_client_ip.description: Whitelisted public client IP. Optional; the CLI can auto-detect it when omitted, but explicit is safer in CI.

namecheap_sandbox.title: NAMECHEAP_SANDBOX
namecheap_sandbox.description: Optional: set to true/1 to use the Namecheap sandbox endpoint.
